Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, thanks for coming, man. You mind waiting here for a sec?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm gonna go ask Ms. Kanou out! Like, right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 2 15 101}Thanks, man! Time to go get myself a girlfriend![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Don't scare me like that, dude. A little encouragement would be nice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Don't be so cold, dude. I mean, there's still a chance she'll turn me down, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}And I'll be way too sad to walk home alone if that happens, y'know? So just hang back a sec![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Dude, dude, dude! Oh man, listen to this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}She said yes! I can't believe it! This is crazy![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I was just about to ask her out, but then she asked me if I wanted a private lesson![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}For real, dude, I owe you! I owe you big time for hearing me out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It sounds like Tomochika's[n]secret plan went well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm about to head over to her house. Oh man, I'm not ready for this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I shouldn't expect anything too crazy from the get-go, right? Then again, she is an adult, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}, forgot you were there. Sorry, but I gotta jet![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting dark, so I decided to head home.[n]{f 1 1}
